A-01.evidence: 6 files all exist on disk. Glob + Read verified: useUrlSync.ts (NEW), internal/serializeState.ts (NEW), useUrlSync.stories.tsx (NEW), useUrlSync.test.ts (NEW), types.ts (MODIFY — UseUrlSyncOptions added at L804), index.ts (MODIFY — useUrlSync + UseUrlSyncOptions exported). All match spec Section 7 table exactly.

A-02.evidence: useUrlSync<TData>(state: GridStateValues<TData>, options?: UseUrlSyncOptions<TData>): void — matches spec Section 2.2 exactly. UseUrlSyncOptions has keys?, debounceMs?, onHydrate?, prefix? — all optional, types match. ALL_KEYS constant contains 8 GridStateKey values matching spec. serializeGridState/deserializeGridState/isDefaultState signatures match spec Section 5.1.

A-03.evidence: typecheck passes (tsc --noEmit 0 errors). build passes (tsup ESM+CJS success in 319ms/320ms). API usage example in useUrlSync.ts JSDoc @example block compiles clean.

A-04.evidence: G-005 is a new hook — no prior variants to map.

A-05.evidence: All 5 ACs implemented: AC-001 (sorting→URL in useUrlSync.ts syncToUrl + S1 test), AC-002 (ALL_KEYS fallback + S2 test), AC-003 (isDefaultState + delete in serializeGridState + S3 test), AC-004 (hydrateRef + mount useEffect + S4 test + SortingUrlSync story), AC-005 (1 Storybook story SortingUrlSync + 5 vitest scenarios S1-S5, ≥3). No deferredAcs[].

A-06.evidence: C-31 wiring verified: Grep 'serializeState' → 2 files found: (1) internal/serializeState.ts (definition), (2) useUrlSync.ts (sole import + call sites). serializeGridState called in syncToUrl closure (L82-88), deserializeGridState called in mount useEffect (L76). Both functions actively called — no dead code.

A-07.evidence: vitest not installed in monorepo (package.json test script = 'echo TODO'). Test file useUrlSync.test.ts authored with 5 scenarios (S1-S5) matching spec Section 6.1, but cannot be executed. Same environment constraint as G-003/G-004 documented deviations. See documentedDeviations[].

B-01.evidence: pnpm -F @tomis/grid-core typecheck → '> tsc --noEmit' with no error output. Exit 0. All 6 new/modified files typecheck clean.

B-02.evidence: Grep 'as any' on src/ → 0 runtime occurrences. The only match is a JSDoc comment in serializeState.ts explaining the F-06 spec defect fix ('(result as any)[key]' — quoted in comment, not in code). No actual 'as any' cast in production code.

B-03.evidence: useUrlSync uses only React hooks (useEffect, useRef) + internal useDebouncedCallback. No TanStack internal APIs accessed. serializeState uses only URLSearchParams (Web standard) + JSON.stringify/parse.

B-04.evidence: No new .css/.scss files created. useUrlSync.stories.tsx uses inline style only in the demo component (style={{...}} for layout) — acceptable for Storybook demo. No static inline style in production hook code.

B-05.evidence: ESLint run directly on useUrlSync.ts + internal/serializeState.ts → no output (0 errors, 0 warnings). The 2 eslint-disable-next-line comments in useUrlSync.ts are for: (1) mount-only [] effect (intentional), (2) 8-primitive deps effect (syncToUrl instability when ms<=0). Neither is a C-32 unstable setter case — C-32 is addressed via useRef (hydrateRef) for onHydrate per D5. ESLint passes on all new files.

B-07.evidence: No dummyData/mockData/fakeData/TODO comments in production code (useUrlSync.ts, serializeState.ts, types.ts additions, index.ts additions). Test/story files contain mock data per exclusion rule.

C-01.evidence: tsc --noEmit passes globally (0 errors). useUrlSync + UseUrlSyncOptions are additive new exports — no existing API changed. affectedUsageFiles = 0 (spec Section 8.1).

C-02.evidence: low tier + affectedUsageFiles = 0. No UI components changed.

C-03.evidence: affectedUsageFiles = 0. No existing usage sites affected.

C-04.evidence: package.json unchanged. react/@tanstack/react-table remain in peerDependencies. No new dependencies added (useDebouncedCallback reused from internal/, URLSearchParams is Web standard — no package dep).

D-01.evidence: affectedUsageFiles = 0 (spec Section 8.1 confirmed). useUrlSync is a new optional hook — no existing files require migration.

E-01.evidence: size-limit run: @tomis/grid-core = 28.29 KB brotli (limit: 30 KB). G-004 baseline was 27.27 KB → G-005 delta = +1.02 KB (within spec D9 estimate of +2 KB). Passed.

E-02.evidence: No new external dependencies added. URLSearchParams is a Web standard API. useDebouncedCallback is reused from internal/.

buildResult.sizeLimit: 28.29 KB brotli / 30 KB limit — PASS (+1.02 KB from G-004 baseline 27.27 KB)

testResult.note: Test script is 'echo TODO' — vitest not installed. A-07 deviation documented.

specCodeDefects.defect: spec template uses '(result as any)[key] = JSON.parse(raw)' — violates C-4 (no 'any') and would trigger B-02 NO. The pattern also requires eslint-disable which combined with D5 (onHydrate useRef to avoid 2nd eslint-disable C-32) creates a 3rd eslint-disable if copied verbatim.
specCodeDefects.fixApplied: Changed 'const result: Partial<GridStateValues> = {}' to 'const result = {} as Record<GridStateKey, unknown>', assigned 'result[key] = JSON.parse(raw) as GridStateValues[typeof key]', returned as 'result as Partial<GridStateValues>'. No 'as any', no eslint-disable needed.

documentedDeviations.reason: vitest not installed in monorepo — package.json test script is 'echo TODO'. Same environment constraint as G-003 and G-004.
documentedDeviations.finding: Test file useUrlSync.test.ts authored with 5 scenarios (S1-S5) all covering spec Section 6.1 scenarios. Tests typecheck clean (tsc --noEmit 0 errors). Runtime execution deferred pending vitest installation.
documentedDeviations.resolution: Developer action: pnpm add -D vitest @testing-library/react jsdom in grid-core package, then pnpm vitest run src/useUrlSync.test.ts

feedback: C-32 compliance (D5): onHydrate handled via useRef (hydrateRef) — option 2. The 2 eslint-disable comments in useUrlSync.ts are for: (1) mount-only [] effect (AC-004, intentional no-deps), (2) 8-primitive deps array excluding syncToUrl (raw fn when debounceMs=0 per useDebouncedCallback.ts L85). Neither is a C-32 unstable-setter case. No 2nd occurrence trigger.
F-06 spec defect fixed: spec Section 5.1 L234-235 '(result as any)[key] = JSON.parse(raw)' — replaced with Record<GridStateKey, unknown> pattern. Recorded in specCodeDefects[].

Prompt structural reference note: user prompt references 'spec Section 11 구현 계획' — actual implementation guide is Section 10 '구현 순서'. Section 11 is '열린 질문 (Open Questions)'. Structural reference error (not value drift) — no promptSpecDrift[] entry per F-05 rubric.
A-07 deviation: vitest not installed (same as G-003/G-004). 5 test scenarios authored (S1-S5, covers all ACs). Typecheck passes. Runtime blocked by missing vitest. See documentedDeviations[].
Size: 28.29 KB brotli — within 30 KB limit. G-005 adds +1.02 KB over G-004 baseline (27.27 KB), within spec D9 +2 KB estimate.
SortingUrlSync story: 1 Storybook story as required by spec Section 6.2 + AC-005. PrefixDemo removed to match spec '1개' requirement exactly.
